sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current blue square positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
blue_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'S']
print("Blue squares now:")
for bn in blue_nodes:
    print(f"  id={bn['id']}, boundary={bn['boundary']}")

# Let me look at the ascii around the blue squares to see the chamber structure
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print("\nAround blue squares (rows 40-55):")
for i in range(40, 56):
    print(f"Row {i:2d}: {ascii_lines[i][17:46]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
